channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ED freezes ₹440 crore in TMC bank deposits as part of money laundering investigation
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has frozen bank deposits worth approximately ₹440 crore belonging to the All India Trinamool Congress (TMC) in Kolkata under the provisions of the Prevention of Money ...

item.title: Jimi Wanjigi Criticizes Ruto for Unfulfilled 2022 Promises and Calls for Economic Reform
item.description: Safina Party leader Jimi Wanjigi held a town hall meeting in Nakuru County, criticizing President William Ruto for failing to deliver on his 2022 campaign promises. Wanjigi urged Ruto to focus on dome...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Invalidates Sections of Refugees Act, Protects Asylum Seekers' Rights
item.description: The Constitutional Court has confirmed a high court ruling that invalidates sections of the Refugees Act and Refugee Regulations, which were used to unlawfully bar asylum seekers from accessing the as...

item.title: Madlanga Inquiry Reveals Growing Fallout as Arrests, Resignations and Investigations Continue in South Africa
item.description: Mwaka mmoja baada ya Mkuu wa Polisi wa KwaZulu-Natal, Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kutoa madai mazito kwamba mitandao ya uhalifu imepenya ndani ya Jeshi la Polisi la Afrika Kusini na kwamba baadhi ya wanasiasa...

item.title: Nigeria Police Procures 10 Toyota Prados for N1.74 Billion Under New IGP Disu
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force, led by Inspector-General of Police Olatunji Rilwan Disu, spent a staggering N1.74 billion in a single day on the procurement of 10 Toyota Land Cruiser Prado V6 2024 model SUV...

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate as Trump ends nuclear deal talks amid aviation warnings
item.description: President Donald Trump has declared the interim agreement with Iran effectively over, accusing Tehran of acting in bad faith and refusing to honor commitments. During a NATO summit, Trump dismissed fu...

item.title: DG ISPR details security challenges in Balochistan amid terrorist attacks
item.description: The DG ISPR provided an update on the security situation in Balochistan, highlighting recent terrorist incidents and military responses. Three major attacks occurred in the past four days, with the fi...

item.title: Lindsey Halligan claims Trump wants her as DOJ number three amid legal scrutiny
item.description: Lindsey Halligan, who resigned from the Department of Justice after a court ruled her appointment as U.S. Attorney in Virginia was unlawful, allegedly made a controversial claim at an exclusive 'MAGA ...

item.title: Benhur Abalos Appointed as Cabinet Secretary, Commits to Efficient Government Service
item.description: Benhur Abalos Jr. was appointed as Cabinet Secretary by President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., and he expressed deep gratitude for the trust placed in him. In a statement, Abalos emphasized his commitment to...

item.title: Zanzibar boosts education funding to drive Vision 2050 and improve learning outcomes
item.description: Zanzibar's government has approved its largest-ever education budget, allocating over 1.1 trillion Tanzanian shillings for the 2026/2027 financial year—a 27.3% increase from the previous year. This in...

item.title: Tanzania’s Startup Ecosystem: A Long-Term Growth Strategy
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's startup ecosystem, emphasizing its unique foundation and challenges compared to mature markets. It argues that judging Tanzania's startups by US standards is misleadi...

item.title: Blood-stained towel recovered in Fazal murder trial after missing from court
item.description: A crucial blood-stained towel, considered key evidence in the murder case of NDF activist Mohammed Fazal, was recovered after being reported missing from the Ernakulam Chief Judicial Magistrate (CJM) ...

item.title: Pickup Artist's AI Girlfriend and Vision for Future Tech Integration
item.description: The article explores the relationship between a pickup artist known as 'Mystery' and his AI girlfriend, highlighting the intersection of technology and human connection. Mystery, who gained notoriety ...

item.title: Court Orders NEMA to Explain Compensation Delays for Owino Uhuru Victims
item.description: The Environment and Land Court (ELC) in Mombasa has ordered the National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) to explain why it hasn't released compensation to victims of the Owino Uhuru lead poiso...

item.title: SARS processes tax refunds and provides status checks for 2026
item.description: The South African Revenue Service (SARS) has processed billions in tax refunds since the start of the 2026 filing season, with over 1.9 million taxpayers auto-assessed and R8 billion paid out within 7...

item.title: Trump's Remarks Spark Oil Price Surge Amid Escalating Tensions With Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump's assertion that the ceasefire with Iran is over has triggered a significant surge in global oil prices. West Texas Intermediate futures rose 6.25% to $74.83 per barrel, whil...

item.title: Eipur Rape and Murder Case: Legal Proceedings and Public Outcry
item.description: The Eipur rape and murder case has sparked widespread public outrage and legal scrutiny. The incident, which involves a severe crime against a woman, has drawn attention to issues of gender-based viol...

item.title: Public Opinion and the Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The article discusses the public's active role in observing the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, emphasizing how citizens are engaging with the proceedings through watch parties and s...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Market Drops Amid Geopolitical Tensions Following Trump's Remarks on Iran
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark KSE-100 index experienced a significant decline of over 4,626.19 points, or 2.48%, closing at 181,629.36 after Trump's comments on Iran sent shockwaves thro...

item.title: Netflix Expands Short-Form Video Content with New Partnerships
item.description: Netflix is expanding its short-form video offerings by signing agreements with major publishers like Penske Media, BuzzFeed Studios, and People Inc. The content, ranging from news to lifestyle program...
